description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Valentine's Day Party — Room 102 (Kindergarten)
events.description: Classroom Valentine's Day party for Room 102 (Kindergarten). Post indicates the party occurred and photos were taken (link to photos provided in the post). Thank you note to volunteers and teacher Ms. Koeltl.

events.title: No School — Presidents Day (Winter Break)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: School closed February 12–16, 2026 for Presidents Day (listed in the classroom newsletter 'Upcoming Events').

events.title: Double Author Visit (Author Visit) — Walnut Heights
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12, 2026 (newsletter notes the date change). Families who would like books signed should pre-order through Rakestraw Bookstore and use the school's shipping address (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596) so books are delivered and can be signed on the day of the visit.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & Kindergarten only)
events.location: MPR, Walnut Heights Elementary — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596 (livestream link to be sent a few days before the event)
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at Walnut Heights. Event begins at 9:30 AM in the MPR and is scheduled to end at 10:00 AM. There will be a livestream for those who cannot attend in person; the link will be sent a few days before the event. Contact: jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org for questions.
